EBA_X10ph2_PHEV_HEV_v5.4

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DAE2F1
Recv ID: 18DAF1E2
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: E2
Func Name: E-ACT-EBA_29b

        "firstbyte": 7,

      },

        "bitoffset": 7
